sections.paragraph:
Original: מדי

Transliteration: mâday

Phonetic: maw-dah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Medes = "middle land"
  1. an inhabitant of Media (noun proper masculine)
  2. the territory inhabited by the Medes (noun proper locative)
    1. located northwest of Persia proper, south and southwest of the Caspian Sea, east of Armenia and Assyria, and west and northwest of the great salt desert of Iram

Origin: corresponding to H4074

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
